news.paragraph: Alibaba is approaching its Q4 earnings report, which serves as a major upcoming catalyst for the stock. While analyst upgrades and new AI launches have provided some positive momentum, traders should weigh this against geopolitical uncertainty surrounding a potential Trump-Xi meeting.
headlines: Should You Hold or Fold Alibaba Stock Ahead of Q4 Earnings?
